title.en: Mozambique Hardware Supplier: Construction Fasteners in Maputo & Beira
title.zh: 莫桑比克五金供应商：马普托和贝拉的建筑紧固件

description.en: Leading Mozambique hardware supplier. Fasteners for construction, mining and agriculture in Maputo, Beira, Nampula. Port of Maputo and Beira shipping. Factory prices with INNOQ certification support.
description.zh: 莫桑比克领先的五金供应商。为马普托、贝拉、南普拉等地的建筑、采矿和农业提供紧固件。马普托港和贝拉港运输。工厂价格，INNOQ认证支持。

keywords: Mozambique fastener supplier, Maputo hardware wholesaler, Beira construction fasteners, Mozambique mining hardware, INNOQ certified, Maputo port import, Southern Africa construction, Mozambique agriculture fasteners

heading.en: Mozambique: Gateway to Southern Africa via Maputo & Beira
heading.zh: 莫桑比克：通过马普托和贝拉通往南非洲的门户

body.en:
Mozambique's strategic ports of Maputo and Beira serve as crucial gateways for imports flowing into Southern Africa, including Zimbabwe, Zambia, Malawi, and parts of the DRC. With the country investing heavily in infrastructure and natural gas projects, demand for construction hardware is growing rapidly. TradeGo Fasteners supplies Mozambican businesses with quality fasteners for mining operations (coal in Tete, aluminum in Maputo), construction projects, and agricultural infrastructure.

Mozambique's economy has grown steadily at 3-5% annually, driven by mega-projects in natural gas extraction (Rovuma Basin LNG), coal mining (Moatize/Tete), and aluminum smelting (Mozal Maputo). The government's National Development Plan 2025-2030 prioritizes infrastructure expansion including roads, bridges, railways, and port modernization.

Key construction projects in 2026 include the Maputo Ring Road expansion, Beira Port modernization, and numerous mining camp infrastructure developments. These projects require substantial quantities of high-quality fasteners including structural bolts, anchor bolts, and corrosion-resistant coatings suitable for Mozambique's coastal climate.

The country's geographic position makes it an ideal transshipment hub for landlocked neighbors. Over 60% of Zimbabwe's imports and 40% of Zambia's copper belt supplies flow through Beira and Maputo ports. This transit trade creates additional demand for fasteners in the logistics and warehousing sectors.

TradeGo's local presence through Beira and Maputo port facilities enables fast delivery to major economic zones including the Maputo Special Economic Zone (ZEE), Mozambique's industrial manufacturing hub.
body.zh: 莫桑比克的马普托和贝拉战略港口是进口货物进入南非洲（包括津巴布韦、赞比亚、马拉维和部分刚果金）的重要门户。随着该国大力投资基础设施和天然气项目，建筑五金需求正在快速增长。TradeGo紧固件为莫桑比克企业提供优质紧固件，用于采矿作业（太特省的煤、马普托的铝）、建筑项目和农业基础设施。

heading.zh: 主要港口：马普托和贝拉

body.en:
Maputo Port is Mozambique's busiest port and gateway to South Africa's industrial heartland and Zimbabwe. Located in Matola Bay, the port handles over 30 million tonnes annually including container cargo, bulk commodities, and project equipment. The Maputo Port Development Company (MPDC) has invested heavily in new berths and modern cargo handling equipment since 2003.

From China, shipments arrive at Maputo via Durban or directly from Asian ports with typical transit times of 25-35 days. Full container loads (FCL) are the most economical option for fastener imports, with 20ft containers accommodating approximately 15-25 tonnes of mixed fasteners.

Beira Port serves the central corridor connecting Zimbabwe, Zambia, and Malawi. The port's strategic location on the Zambezi River delta makes it the natural gateway for landlocked southern African markets. Beira handled 12 million tonnes in 2025 and is undergoing modernization to increase capacity.

For fastener imports, both ports offer dedicated container terminals with efficient customs clearance. We provide complete documentation including Bill of Lading, Commercial Invoice, Packing List, and Certificate of Origin for INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalização e Qualidade) compliance.

Road transport from Beira to Harare (Zimbabwe) takes 8-10 hours via the A9 highway. From Maputo to Johannesburg takes 6-7 hours via the N4 Maputo-Witbank route. We coordinate with established freight forwarders for last-mile delivery throughout the region.
body.zh: 马普托港是莫桑比克最繁忙的港口，也是通往南非工业中心和津巴布韦的门户。贝拉港则服务于连接津巴布韦、赞比亚和马拉维的中部走廊。

body.en:
TradeGo supplies comprehensive fastener solutions for Mozambique's construction, mining, and agricultural sectors. Our product range meets international standards while addressing the specific requirements of Mozambican projects.

For coastal construction in Maputo and Beira, hot-dip galvanized (HDG) and stainless steel fasteners are essential due to high humidity and salt air exposure. We recommend HDG anchor bolts (ASTM F1554 Grade 36 or 55) for foundation work and structural connections in marine environments.

Mining operations in Tete Province (coal) and Maputo Province (aluminum/Mozal) require heavy-duty fasteners resistant to vibration and chemical exposure. Our Grade 8.8 and 10.9 hex bolts with zinc plating or Dacromet coating perform reliably in these demanding conditions.

Agricultural infrastructure projects including irrigation systems, storage facilities, and farm buildings use our general-purpose fasteners including:

- Hex bolts M10-M24 for structural connections
- Coach screws M8-M12 for timber construction
- Self-drilling screws for metal roofing (IBR and corrugated sheets)
- Washers and nuts in various grades
- Anchor bolts for equipment installation

For road and bridge construction, we supply high-strength structural fasteners meeting SABS or equivalent standards. These include friction grip bolts for steel bridge connections and expansion anchors for concrete structures.

Minimum order quantity is 500kg for sea freight shipments, with mixed container loads welcome. We offer consolidated shipping from our China facilities to optimize freight costs for Mozambican importers.
body.zh: TradeGo供应全面的紧固件解决方案，满足莫桑比克建筑、采矿和农业部门的具体需求。

body.en:
What are the import duties for fasteners in Mozambique?

Fasteners typically attract import duties of 7.5-20% depending on material and coating. Galvanized and stainless steel fasteners may face higher rates. Our commercial invoices detail HS codes for customs classification.

What documentation is required for importing fasteners to Mozambique?

Required documents include: Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Bill of Lading, Certificate of Origin, and INNOQ compliance declaration. For commercial projects, a certified mill test report verifying steel grade and mechanical properties is also recommended.

What is the typical lead time from China to Beira Port?

Sea freight from China to Beira takes 25-35 days depending on departure port. Air freight is available for urgent orders with 7-10 day delivery. We recommend ordering 45-60 days ahead of project requirements.

Do your fasteners meet Mozambican standards?

We supply fasteners meeting SABS, ISO, and DIN standards which are widely accepted in Mozambique. For INNOQ-certified projects, we provide documentation packages supporting compliance verification.

What payment terms do you offer?

Standard payment is 30% deposit via T/T, balance against copy of Bill of Lading. For established customers, we offer open account terms up to 60 days. Letter of Credit (L/C) available for large orders.

Can you handle consolidated shipments for multiple products?

Yes. We regularly consolidate fasteners with other construction materials including steel, tools, and safety equipment for container shipments to Maputo and Beira.
body.zh:
进口莫桑比克紧固件的关税是多少？

根据材料和镀层不同，关税通常为7.5-20%。

从中国到贝拉港的交货期是多少？

海运从中国到贝拉需要25-35天。
